2008.blurb: New Jersey art-rock band reunited in 2008 after a 17-year hiatus, known for frenetic live performances and meticulous studio work.

quotes.text: We were getting kind of burnt with playing and touring at that point.

2014.blurb: Nashville rock band at peak momentum in 2014, known for their four-guitar lineup and ferociously energetic live shows.

2012.blurb: New York-based guitarist touring behind her album 'The Chronicles of Marnia', known for two-handed tapping and relentless live energy.
